items.title: What A.J. Brown would bring to the Patriots' offen...
items.body_text: An Eagles' trade with New England for the receiver has been rumored for months. Could it happen this week?
items.author: Mike Reiss

items.title: Offseason changes bring new look to Commanders: 'W...
items.body_text: Here are the changes on offense and defense that Washington has made -- so far -- this offseason.
items.author: John Keim

items.title: Sources: Vikings hire Seahawks' Teasley as GM
items.body_text: The Vikings have hired Nolan Teasley as their general manager, sources told NFL Network, concluding an unusual chapter for the franchise.
items.author: Kevin Seifert

items.title: Carter, Dart express unity after Trump dispute
items.body_text: Giants teammates Jaxson Dart and Abdul Carter expressed solidarity Friday following their "disagreement" over the quarterback's involvement in an event for President Donald Trump.
items.author: Jordan Raanan

items.title: Sources: Giants fear Olszewski has torn Achilles
items.body_text: Giants wide receiver Gunner Olszewski went down during OTAs with a noncontact injury that the team fears is a torn Achilles tendon, sources told ESPN.
items.author: Jordan Raanan

items.title: Nacua 'grateful' to Rams for support after lawsuit...
items.body_text: Puka Nacua said he is "grateful for the support" from the Rams organization after a civil lawsuit was filed against him in March.
items.author: Sarah Barshop

items.title: Source: Steelers assistant fired for misconduct
items.body_text: The Steelers have fired senior special teams assistant Derius Swinton II for a violation of club policy, sources told ESPN.
items.author: Brooke Pryor

items.title: 49ers' Bosa 'far along' in rehab, eyes camp return...
items.body_text: 49ers defensive end Nick Bosa said he is making progress recovering from a torn ACL and could be back for the start of training camp or soon after, barring any setbacks.
items.author: Nick Wagoner

items.title: Reid: Jailed Rice learning life lesson right now
items.body_text: While most of the Chiefs participated in voluntary workouts this week, Rashee Rice was back in Texas serving his 30-day jail sentence after violating the terms of his probation for his role in a car crash that left multiple people injured.
items.author: Nate Taylor

items.title: CMC: Workload monitored in practice, not games
items.body_text: 49ers running back Christian McCaffrey said he doesn't want a lighter workload this season after leading the NFL with 413 touches last season.
items.author: Nick Wagoner

items.title: 🏈 Simulating trades for Coleman, Kmet, more
items.body_text: We proposed trade offers for Keon Coleman, Cole Kmet, Anthony Richardson Sr. and Kayvon Thibodeaux. Could any of them be on the move?

items.title: Solak picks the 10 most improved units through off...
items.body_text: Let's stack the 10 biggest upgrades at specific positions since the end of last season, including three teams' linebacker units.
items.author: Ben Solak

items.title: Let's evaluate every NFC team's offseason: 16 team...
items.body_text: We're picking out the offseason's highs (Vikings getting Kyler Murray on the veterans minimum) and lows (Niners taking Kaelon Black in Round 3) for every NFC team.
items.author: Bill Barnwell

items.title: Garrett Wilson and Jets find inspiration in Knicks...
items.body_text: Wilson offered a presumably unwitting shoutout to another memorable New York sports team -- the 1973 Mets -- in his commentary on the Knicks and sports in the Big Apple.
items.author: Rich Cimini
